## AI Video Creator v1.0.4

Fixes **Clear all** and **Reset to Default** so the project actually clears and stays cleared after reload.

### What's fixed

- **Full workspace reset** — Clears project fields, analyzers, Director settings, GPU workflow, manuscript chat, and build progress in one action
- **Immediate blank autosave** — Blank state is written to storage right away, so a quick restart no longer restores the default courier-alley prefill
- **Electron confirm** — Clear all / Reset use a native desktop confirm dialog instead of unreliable `window.confirm`
- **UI sync** — Director, GPU, and build panels refresh when reset completes

### Auto-update

Installed **v1.0.3** apps should pick this up via GitHub auto-update, or download the new installer below.
